assertions.title: Workspace fetches real documents from API when online

steps.expected: Page loads and fetches from API
steps.observed: Page loaded successfully with API running

assertions.title: Public docs fetches real document from API when online

steps.expected: Document is fetched from API and SSR renders it

evidence.network: Verified SSR fetch by Node server from port 3333

assertions.title: Document created in workspace appears in public docs after publish

steps.action: Create space, version, and document via API

steps.observed: Public docs returned 200 OK for the newly created and published document

assertions.title: New release version appears in public docs version selector

steps.action: Create new version in existing space
Open version selector on public doc

assertions.title: Publishing triggers public docs cache invalidation

steps.action: Publish document and navigate to public URL within 5s
steps.expected: Document is visible immediately without stale cache

frictions.description: Playwright network interception was difficult for SSR tests since Next.js fetches from the server, not the browser client.
frictions.resolution: Verified the integration via API and checking the HTTP 200 responses and rendered UI.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 5 passed. Verified integration between workspace creation, API, and public docs rendering.
